indications_and_usage: Adults and children 2 years and older: apply to the affected area, not more than 3 to 4 times a day. Children under 2 years of age: consult a physician. To apply to face, squeeze into palm of hand and gently apply.
dosage_and_administration: For the temporary relief of pain and itching due to sunburn, minor burns, insect bites, minor cuts, scrapes, and minor skin irritations.
